# PRIVATE_USER

**Enumeration Case**

Participants who were invited to share the record by the owner.

## Declaration

```swift
const String PRIVATE_USER;
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **OWNER**: The owner of the shared record who can add private users but not add public users.
- **PUBLIC_USER**: Participants who accepted a shared record by accessing the share URL.
- **UNKNOWN**: Unknown type of participant.
